description: Staffing compliance thresholds and metric definitions for facility-quarter summaries. Extend state_thresholds for new states; wire MACPAC later without changing summary column names.

total_rn_hours.description: Total reported RN hours (RN + RN administrator + DON), matching PBJ320 rn_total_8h.

total_nurse_hprd.description: PBJ320 Total_Nurse_HPRD (all reported nursing roles incl. admin/DON).

direct_care_hprd.description: NY PHL § 2895-b mapped direct care HPRD (RN+LPN+CNA+NA trainee+MedAide; excludes DON and nursing admin).

state_thresholds.label: Days below NY 3.50 direct care HPRD
state_thresholds.notes: N.Y. Public Health Law § 2895-b sets a 3.50 HPRD minimum for mapped direct-care nursing (RN, LPN, CNA, nurse aide trainee, medication aide). PBJ320 screens reported PBJ daily hours using that role mapping (excludes DON and nursing administrator)—informative, not an enforcement determination. Source: https://www.nysenate.gov/legislation/laws/PBH/2895-B

state_thresholds.label: Days below CT 3.06 total nursing HPRD
state_thresholds.notes: MACPAC state compendium: 3.06 HPRD total estimated staffing. CT Public Act (eff. Oct 2021, Sec. 10) directed DPH to set nursing home minimums often summarized as ~3.0 direct-care hours per resident per day. PBJ320 applies the 3.06 benchmark to total reported nursing HPRD (all PBJ nursing roles incl. admin/DON), not Nurse_Care_HPRD alone.
